title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Asia-Pacific — Q2 2026
summary: Nine Asia-Pacific markets are implementing licensing, custody, and AML supervision frameworks in Q3 2026, with Australia's stablecoin payment licensing consultation (H1 deadline), South Korea's institutional custody framework (Q4), and Philippines VASP registration creating immediate compliance infrastructure demand. Travel Rule enforcement shifts from implementation to active supervision across Australia, Thailand, and South Korea, while custody standards roll out in Indonesia and institutional
